title: PMC-OA literature extraction of model descriptions (reviewed)
context: Model descriptions in the literature are extracted only from the PMC Open Access subset, with per-article license verification and human review of every AI-extracted assertion before publish (PLAN M2). Depends on the schema (001). Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Extract Ewing model descriptions from PMC-OA articles, provenance-stamping each assertion to its article and human-reviewing before publish.
acceptanceCriteria: Only PMC Open Access subset articles (license verified per article).
Every AI-extracted assertion provenance-stamped to the article + human-reviewed before publish; no unsourced or model-originated claims.
output: output/ literature-extraction dataset from PMC-OA articles, per-assertion provenance-stamped and human-reviewed.
